channel.title: APKMirror on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in APKMirror on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to install .XAPK files on Android! | APKMirror Installer |
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-_P2jkv66zaw/YVCOtJOHSEI/AAAAAAAAGss/GzydNcbGBTcyXOAnF6fFXYjYXPBRg6qMACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1632669353152710-0.png" alt=""> If you side-load apps by downloading .apk files from websites like APKMirror.com or Apkpure.com or any other popular .apk file providing websites you may probably know they provide millions of .apks which you can easily able to install on your android devices for free without the requirement of app store like Google Play which will help people who don’t have access to Google Play like for example : people from countries where Google Play or Google services banned or restricted like china, iran etc.
